Face Sorrow
2to5 Right hand Happiness
6,7,8 Right leg Travel
9, 10, 11 Left leg Loss
12 to 15 Left hand Gain
16 to 20 Stomach Pleasures
21 to 23 Head Happiness
24,25 Eyes Happiness
26,27 Back Danger
Th~se observations will go a long way in dating the event
and in determining the precise nature of the event. The confu
sion that has been set afoot by the directional system can be
resolved by working either on the one-degree arc or on the
three degree arc in conjunction with the dasa system and the
transit influences. Then alone can we succeed in rationalising
astrology.

8
Directions: Some Attempted
Equations
Rectification
Rectification of the given time of birth is a rather difficult
problem. Many attempts have been made, and not one can be
said to be accurate in so far as adjusting an approximately
correct time of birth. I do not mean that I have discovered one.
My purpose is only to focus the attention of the readers on the
